    Methylene Blue Gummies for Nerve Pain Relief

    4.8 (68,343+ Reviews)

    18 Minutes

    Nerve Cells

    60-Day

    Non-Addictive

    60-Day Results Guarantee

    Feel relief or it's free!

    If you don't experience noticeable relief from your nerve pain within 60 days, you'll get a full refund. No questions asked.

    Product Details

    30 Gummies per Bag

    5mg Methylene Blue per Gummy

    2g Total Carbs per Gummy

    2g Sugar per Gummy


    How to Take Methylene Blue Gummies

    Take 1 gummy each morning with food

    Brush teeth after taking to prevent blue staining

    Your urine will turn blue — this confirms the methylene blue is working

    Adjust dosage based on your needs

    Maintain daily consistency for optimal results


    Does methylene blue work for nerve pain and neuropathy?

    Yes, methylene blue has strong scientific evidence for reducing nerve pain and neuropathy symptoms. Many peer-reviewed studies prove its effectiveness through several mechanisms.


    A major 2021 review published in Frontiers in Neuroscience found that methylene blue reduces inflammation, blocks too much nerve signaling, and greatly decreases overactive nerve firing in laboratory studies.


    In a Swedish clinical trial from 2015 (Journal of Pain Research), 10 patients with severe chronic nerve pain that hadn't responded to other treatments received methylene blue. The majority of them felt complete pain reduction within 24 hours compared to placebo... showing clear benefits.


    Here's how it works: Methylene blue enters the mitochondria and acts as an electron carrier in the electron transport chain.


    It bypasses damaged areas and restores energy production while reducing harmful inflammation markers like nitric oxide.


    Important: Methylene blue works for peripheral neuropathy but does not treat diabetic neuropathy. Please consult your doctor before using if you have diabetes.


    Does methylene blue help with hip pain, joint pain, and other body pain?

    Yes, methylene blue shows good results for hip pain, shoulder pain, back pain, and joint pain through several clinical uses.


    Hip Pain: A 2025 study looked at methylene blue added to nerve blocks for hip replacement surgery patients. Results showed better pain control after surgery. Other research on PENG (pericapsular nerve group) blocks showed that methylene blue spreads well to pain nerves around the hip joint, giving targeted relief.


    Joint Pain and Osteoarthritis: A 2022 study published in Acta Pharmacologica Sinica found that methylene blue protects cartilage (the cushioning tissue in joints), reduces inflammation in the joint lining, and gives real pain relief. The mechanism involves turning on Nrf2 and PRDX1...cellular protection systems that fight oxidative stress.


    General Body Pain: The 2021 Frontiers in Neuroscience review explains that methylene blue reduces pain through three ways: reducing inflammation, calming overactive nerve signals, and blocking pain signals at the cellular level.


    Is methylene blue safe to take?

    Methylene blue has a well-known safety record based on over 150 years of medical use. Our 5mg dose is well within the safe range established by clinical research.


    Normal Effect: Your urine will turn bright blue within 2-4 hours...this is normal and proves the product is being absorbed and processed by your kidneys.


    Blood Pressure Concerns: If you have uncontrolled high blood pressure (over 140/90), take multiple blood pressure medicines, or have very low blood pressure (under 90/60), please consult your doctor before use. Check your blood pressure during the first week. Most users see no changes at this dose.


    Heart Medications: If you take heart medicines, please consult your doctor before starting methylene blue to check for possible interactions.

    Never Take If:

    • SSRI/SNRI antidepressants (Zoloft, Prozac, Cymbalta, Effexor, Lexapro, etc.): Methylene blue acts as a monoamine oxidase inhibitor (MAOI), which can cause serotonin syndrome when mixed with these medicines...a serious and possibly dangerous interaction.


    • G6PD deficiency: A rare genetic condition that can cause hemolytic anemia when exposed to methylene blue.


    If neither condition applies to you, methylene blue is safe for daily use at the recommended 5mg dose.


    Does it show up on DOT / federal / workplace drug tests?

    No, methylene blue does not cause false positives on standard drug tests. It's not a controlled substance, doesn't metabolize into anything that resembles illegal drugs, and isn't tested for on workplace, DOT, federal, or athletic drug screens.


    However, if you're taking a very specialized test, inform the testing facility you're taking methylene blue...some rare lab tests can be affected by the blue dye itself (like urine culture visibility), but this doesn't indicate drug use.

    Been dealing with nerve pain from a herniated disc for 3 years. Nothing worked. My wife ordered these for me. Around week 4 the shooting pain down my leg started fading. Now at week 8 I can play 18 holes of golf again.

    James T., 61, Accountant

    Verified Customer

    Meet The Science-Backed Solution for Nerve Pain

    Methylene Blue works by fixing mitochondrial function. When you have neuropathy, your mitochondria can't get enough oxygen to make energy, so your nerves start dying. By improving how mitochondria transfer electrons, methylene blue helps your cells produce more ATP—the fuel that powers your nerves and every healing process they perform.

    Stops Burning & Tingling 

    Calms overactive pain signals in damaged nerves.

    Restores Feeling in Numb Areas 

    Calms overactive pain signals in damaged nerves.

    Sleep Through the Night 

    No more waking up from burning feet.

    Walk Without Stumbling 

    Better balance when your feet can feel again.

    Repairs Nerve Damage 
    Helps nerves grow new connections over 60 days.

    I've had neuropathy in both feet for about 4 years now, and the burning got so bad that I literally couldn't sleep at night. I mean, I'd be tossing and turning for hours. Started taking these gummies around 2 months ago, and honestly by week 3 the burning just stopped, like it finally gave up or something. Now I can actually feel my toes again when I'm driving, which you might not think is a big deal but when you're a truck driver like me and you need to feel those pedals to stay safe, it changes everything.

    Robert M., 58

    Verified Customers

    So I'm a retired nurse, which means I've seen pretty much every supplement and cream out there, and I was really skeptical about this whole thing. But after trying literally everything for my neuropathy, and I mean everything, from prescription meds to weird herbal teas my neighbor recommended. I figured what's the harm in one more attempt, right? Started taking one gummy every morning with my coffee, and around day 10, I wasn't limping anymore when I walked to the mailbox. By week 5, those awful electric shocks in my feet that used to make me jump were completely gone, just vanished. Now I can stand for my whole shift at the food bank without wanting to cry from the pain, and my daughter kept asking me why I was smiling so much lately. I told her it's because I genuinely forgot what it feels like to not be in pain all day long. I wish I'd found this 2 years ago, honestly, because I could've saved myself so much suffering. Already ordered 6 more bags because there's no way I'm ever running out of these.

    Linda S., 62

    Verified Customers

    I’m 61 and have dealt with tingling and burning in my feet for years. I wasn’t expecting miracles, but these methylene blue gummies genuinely helped. After about two weeks, the pins-and-needles feeling eased up enough that I could sleep through the night. Taste is fine, easy to take, no stomach issues for me. I reordered.

    James T., 61

    Verified Customers

    I added these methylene blue gummies to my daily routine because they were easy to take and did not feel like another chore. After a couple of weeks, I realized I was moving through my evenings more comfortably. Over time it clicked that the burning and tingling in my feet had quieted down. I am 56 and have lived with nerve issues for years, especially at night. Sleeping through the night again has been the biggest change. The gummies are simple, taste fine, and actually deliver results if you stay consistent.

    Patricia H., 56

    Verified Customers

    Balance has been an issue because of numbness in my feet. I did not even realize how much sensation I had lost until it started coming back. After about a month on these gummies, I feel more aware of where my feet are when I walk. That confidence is huge. I have not had any stomach issues or headaches. Very easy to add to my routine.

    Michael K., 59

    Verified Customers

    My feet used to burn so badly at night that I'd get up and just walk around the house at 2 in the morning, this went on for 7 years. Seven entire years of basically no sleep, where my husband would wake up and find me pacing around the kitchen in the middle of the night because lying down somehow made the burning even worse. I tried every cream you can imagine, every pill the doctor prescribed, even acupuncture which I was really skeptical about, and I probably spent close to $3,000 on various treatments that ultimately did absolutely nothing for me. Then my daughter sent me these gummies in out of the blue… and I didn't expect much to be honest because everything else had failed so spectacularly. But after 10-15 days, I slept through the entire night for the first time since 2017, and when I woke up the next morning I actually started crying. My husband came running in asking what was wrong, and I told him nothing's wrong, I just slept! The burning isn't completely gone, I'll be honest about that, but it's down to maybe a 2 out of 10 instead of an 8 or 9, and you know what? I can live with that. I can actually live now instead of just surviving.


    Sharon W., 64

    Verified Customers

    I'm a mechanic, been working on cars for 30+ years. Had neuropathy for about 5 years and couldn't feel my feet anymore, which is actually really dangerous when you're working under cars. I almost had a transmission fall on me once because my foot slipped off the jack and I didn't even realize it until I saw it moving. That scared me pretty bad. Started taking these back in January, and by February I could feel the shop floor under my boots again. Not perfect, but enough to know where my feet are. Now I'm not terrified every single time I have to get under a lift.


    David R., 57

    Verified Customers

    My neuropathy started after a back surgery that didn't go quite right… ended up with this burning and tingling sensation in both legs that lasted for 2 full years and made everything hurt, even something as simple as sitting at my desk to work. I do consulting from home, so I spend a lot of time on video calls with clients, and I was honestly getting ready to just retire early and give up on everything because I couldn't sit through a single client call without constantly shifting around and squirming in my chair trying to find a position that didn't hurt. My son found these gummies online somewhere and sent me a bag to try, and about three weeks in I noticed the tingling was starting to fade a little bit. Now at 8 weeks I can actually sit through a 2-hour Zoom meeting without losing my mind, which probably doesn't sound like a huge accomplishment to most people, but when you've been in constant pain for 2 years straight, just being able to sit normally and focus on your work feels like an absolute miracle.

    Karen B., 61

    Verified Customers

    Why Methylene Blue Gummies Work When Everything Else Failed

    We know you've tried gabapentin, creams, vitamins, and nothing worked. We get it. That's why we created these gummies, to finally give you real relief by fixing what's actually broken in your nerves.

    Methylene Blue Gummies

    60-Day Money-Back Guarantee

    Backed by Science.

    Proven by Results.

    Designed for nerve and musculoskeletal pain relief.

    Fast Pain Relief for Hard-to-Treat Nerve Pain

    Most patients felt much less pain within days

    In a double-blind, controlled clinical trial, people with chronic neuropathic pain that didn’t respond to other treatments were given methylene blue. Pain levels decreased significantly within 24 hours and continued improving on day two, with measurably better outcomes compared to the placebo group. 

    📖 See the Study

    (Journal of Pain Research, 2015)

    Long-Lasting Relief for Back and Joint Nerve Pain

    Pain relief lasted up to 6 months

    In a randomized controlled trial of people with lumbar facet joint syndrome, methylene blue lowered pain intensity, improved back function, helped sleep, and reduced pain-related depression. Results were better than the control group and lasted 6 months.

    📖 See the Study

    (Pain Physician, 2022)

    Over 90% of People Were Happy with Their Nerve Pain Relief

    Most patients felt much less pain within days

    In a clinical study involving 72 patients with chronic nerve-related low back pain caused by irritated spinal nerves, those given methylene blue experienced significant pain reduction (pain scores decreased by more than 50%) and demonstrated improved mobility and function.

    📖 See the Study

    (Pain Journal, 2010)

    Your Order is Protected By:

    60-Day Results Guarantee

    If you take Methylene Blue daily for 60 days and don’t feel a noticeable difference in your nerve pain, burning, tingling, or numbness we’ll refund you 100%—no questions asked.

    Your Nerve Healing Timeline

    See how Methylene Blue feeds oxygen to your nerve cells and helps them repair over 60 days, reducing pain gradually as your nerves heal.

    🌞 Week 1-2

    Initial Relief Begins

    The burning and tingling start to calm down. You might notice you're sleeping better because the pain isn't waking you up at 3am anymore. Methylene blue is flooding your nerve cells with oxygen.

    ☀️  Week 3-4

    Real Improvement Shows Up

    The electric shocks happen less often. You can walk to the mailbox without stumbling. The constant burning drops from an 8 to maybe a 4. Your feet feel less numb when you stand up in the morning.

    🌤️ Week 5-6

    Function Starts Coming Back

    You can feel the gas pedal again when you drive. Walking doesn't require as much concentration because your balance is better. The tingling in your hands fades enough that you can button your shirt without frustration.

    🌙 Week 7-8 (60 Days)

    Nerves Repair & Regenerate

    Sensation returns to areas that were numb. Your nerves have grown new connections and can make energy properly again.

    The History of Methylene Blue

    What if we told you that the same compound doctors have used since 1876 to treat nerve conditions is now helping thousands of people find relief from chronic nerve pain

    Methylene Blue isn't just another supplement, it's a time-tested, scientifically-backed compound that has been used for over 150 years in medicine and neuroscience. From treating nerve damage to protecting cells from dying, its benefits are as remarkable as its history.

    How did a 19th-century medical breakthrough become one of the most effective nerve pain solutions today?

    Feel like yourself again.

    Every day.

    Stop the burning, tingling, and numbness that's been stealing your life. Get real relief with a solution that actually fixes your nerves.

    Linda D.
    "Skeptical but it works"

    As a retired nurse, I side-eye most supplements. My daughter insisted I try these gummies... and within 4 days my hands stopped tingling all the time. I can write without cramping

    G
    Gregory V.
    "Finally sleeping through the night"

    I honestly didn’t expect much when I started taking these gummies, but here we are. The burning in my feet used to run my nights. Now it’s background noise instead of center stage. I’m sleeping, walking normally, and feeling hopeful again.

    M
    Matthew B.
    "Back to work"

    I work construction, started taking these gummies out of desperation. Gradually I noticed the ground felt solid again instead of numb and buzzy. That alone made them worth it.

    E
    Edward U.
    "Wish I found this sooner"

    I’ve thrown money at every “miracle” nerve formula out there. These gummies are the first thing that actually changed how my feet feel day to day. The electric zap feeling is mostly gone and I’m walking my dog without dreading it.

    S
    Sharon W.
    "Can drive again"

    Random but important: your urine will turn blue, and yes it’s alarming the first time. It just means it’s potent. I kept taking the gummies and noticed my foot pain steadily backing off. Small price to pay.

    J
    Jayme P.
    "No more gabapentin brain fog"

    Switching to these gummies was a gamble. Turns out I get better relief and my brain still works. I feel clear, lighter, and more like myself.

    K
    Kevin O.
    "Actually fixes the problem"

    The numbness in my toes has eased up enough that I can actually feel the floor again

    P
    Patty S.
    "Not a miracle but close"

    The drop in pain has been dramatic for me. I can stand longer, move easier, and I’m not constantly bracing for that burning surge. TrueHealthic really surprised me.

    C
    Carlos M.
    "Blue pee freaked me out but worth it"

    Driving had started to scare me because my feet felt disconnected. After getting consistent with these gummies, that disconnected feeling faded. I didn’t realize how tense I’d been until I finally relaxed behind the wheel.

    C
    Carla S.
    "Better than prescription drugs"

    I’m stubborn and didn’t believe in supplements. My hubby bought these gummies anyway. I hate admitting he was right. The shooting nerve pain down my legs is calmer and more manageable. I reordered before finishing the bag.
